title: Take Hudson to College 🏫
subtitle: Move into UCSB
itineraryNotes:
TODO: consider SeaTac parking vs uber

Gay’s picks for hotels:

For your travel project, we need a hotel to take Hudson for school. I looked at a few hotels though the amex website and these are all acceptable to me but I figured you could book and use your app.  Acceptable

[Hideaway](https://www.kirkwoodcollection.com/hideaway/rooms/)
[Canary Hotel](https://www.ihg.com/kimptonhotels/hotels/us/en/canary-hotel-santa-barbara-ca/sabcn/hoteldetail)
[The Stewared](https://www.marriott.com/en-us/hotels/sbatx-the-steward-santa-barbara-a-tribute-portfolio-hotel/overview/)
[Hotel Californian](https://www.hotelcalifornian.com/)

I think we should arrive on the 17th of sept, run our purchase errands on the 18th and pick up supplies and then we are moving in on the 19th & 20th.  He will get a staggered time for move in on one of those dates? So I supposed we can fly home late on the 20th pretty safely?

places.name: Hotel Californian
places.address: 36 State St, Santa Barbara, CA 93101, USA

steps.instruction: Turn left onto WM L Moffett Pl
Turn left onto S Fairview Ave
Turn right to merge onto US-101 South
Take exit 96 C onto Garden St
Turn right onto Garden St
Turn right onto E Cabrillo Blvd
Turn right onto Helena Ave
Turn left
The destination is on your right

places.name: Target
places.address: 3891 State St, Santa Barbara, CA 93105, USA

places.name: Pottery Barn
places.address: 110 S Hope Ave Ste H-28C, Santa Barbara, CA 93105, USA

places.name: Bed Bath & Beyond
places.notes: Full selection of bedding, pillows, towels, and dorm essentials. Typically offers student discounts during move-in season.

places.name: Target
places.notes: Wide range of affordable dorm items including storage bins, desk organizers, lighting, and décor. Often has dedicated back-to-college sections.

places.name: Walmart
places.notes: Budget-friendly option for basics like bedding, hangers, cleaning supplies, and electronics accessories.

places.name: IKEA
places.notes: Compact furniture and storage solutions perfect for dorm rooms, plus affordable décor and organizational items.

places.name: Local Home Depot or Lowe's
places.notes: Hardware store option for items like power strips, extension cords, and any last-minute repairs or modifications.

steps.instruction: Head northeast on E Mason St toward Helena Ave
Turn left onto Anacapa St
Turn right onto E Yanonali St
Turn left onto Garden St
Turn left to merge onto US-101 N
Take exit 104B for CA-217 toward Airport/Ucsb
Continue onto CA-217 W/Ward Memorial BlvdDestination will be on the right
